title: Untitled
content:
The app should detect invalid QR codes and show an alert instead of continuing to scan repeatedly.

Add an option to pay via mobile number (e.g., PhonePe number). This would require functionality to fetch or map a UPI ID from the entered phone number.

Implement an initial login or OTP-based system to support multiple users securely.

Add a mechanism to update or modify app functionality dynamically without requiring users to download a new app version each time.

Provide a clear step-by-step onboarding guide for APK setup, including instructions for enabling required permissions (e.g., services like USSD or trust permissions).


fix the button i complete the payment 

Tasks

Paynow button fix 
Update the UI labels remove any confusing or unnecessary “searching” text and eliminate anything that looks like USSD-style prompts.
Logo change 
fix the infor part not showing airpay name 
Can fetch any kind of upi id
Last button fix
